HttpRequestExtensionsGetExternalBaseUrl Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns the base URL of this server as it was used by the client to make the request.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManager
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public static string GetExternalBaseUrl(
	this HttpRequest request
)

Parameters

request
Type: HttpRequest

Return Value

Type: String

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type HttpRequest. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
